free_text: Experimental determination of the cross sections
of nuclear reactions by the method of analysis of
the concentration profiles of transmutation nuclides.
Plane-parallel targets were placed on a brass holder.
Layers of 2-10 mm thickness were measured.
Gamma activity was measured by Ge(Li) detector.
Diameter of the beam was 1.1 cm, energy of particles
was 20 MeV, density of beam flux was 6*10**11 and
Semiconductor compound of GaAs was used.
Semiconductor compound of GaP was used.
Semiconductor compound of GaAs was used.
Semiconductor compound of GaP was used.
Semiconductor compound of GaAs was used.
Semiconductor compound of GaP was used.
Superconducting ceramics of YBCO was used.
Superconducting ceramics of YBCO was used.
